Projects

Projects

Here is a list of projects I’ve worked on, focusing on security tools and utilities to assist in reconnaissance, subdomain enumeration, and more.

ExplorerPy

Description: A scanning toolkit for subdomain enumeration, directory brute-forcing, and port scanning.
Link: ExplorerPy on GitHub

Umap - UrlMap

Description: Advanced URL filtering tool written in Go that filters out uninteresting URLs based on specific criteria.
Link: Umap on GitHub

CodeCipher

Description: An all-in-one data conversion utility supporting multiple formats such as URL, Base64, and HTML.
Link: CodeCipher on GitHub

Sub-Scan

Description: A multi-threaded subdomain discovery tool.
Link: Sub-Scan on GitHub

Feel free to explore these tools, contribute, or reach out with any questions or suggestions. Thank you for checking out my projects!
